name: custom-xml-sitemap
description: Custom taxonomy-based XML sitemap generator for WordPress.
author: XWP

scripts.i18n:pot: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot wp-content/plugins/custom-xml-sitemap wp-content/plugins/custom-xml-sitemap/languages/custom-xml-sitemap.pot --domain=custom-xml-sitemap
scripts.i18n:json: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-json wp-content/plugins/custom-xml-sitemap/languages --no-purge
